EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team have been unable to speak with a FUL scheme customer at the second attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Unable to reach - Best time to call? FUL
EmailTemplate.subject: Don’t miss out on your renewal benefits
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
I’ve not yet been able to reach you to discuss your renewal quote over the phone.
I don’t want you to lose out on these key benefits:
- Unlimited retroactive cover - protects you against claims arising from work you completed before your current insurance policy began. - Worldwide Jurisdiction cover - ensures that you're protected almost anywhere that your work may take you. - Nil excess - guarantees no unexpected out-of-pocket expenses in the event of a claim. - Sub-Contractors - includes cover for up to 3 business-facing sub-contractors (BFSCs), provided they hold the same levels of cover as you.
It would be good to discuss your requirements to make sure your renewal quote is right for your business. Is there a good time for me to give you a call?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
